task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: If down_revision mismatches or migration fails on existing DB, schema drift blocks all downstream work; sessions.process_type backfill must complete before scoring uses it.
task_scores.higher_leverage_alternative: Could defer Step 1.7 (process_type in create_session) until Phase 2 wiring to ship GET/PUT faster, but backfill depends on it.
task_scores.reasoning: Critical foundation with specific files and verification; migration is irreversible and blocks everything.

task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: If cache is not invalidated in finally block or GET score omits active_threshold_spec, Replay and WelderReport show stale or missing spec.
task_scores.reasoning: Core value delivery — scoring uses DB thresholds; full active_threshold_spec unlocks micro-feedback and callouts; dependencies documented.

task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: If isCompleteForm or canSave logic is wrong, admin may PUT partial data and corrupt threshold rows.
task_scores.higher_leverage_alternative: Could ship tabs + angle fields only first (2h), defer thermal/amps/volts to Phase 4, since angle is the main demo differentiator.
task_scores.reasoning: Enables 'calibrate to your spec' demo; fully reversible; Step 3.4 isCompleteForm prevents partial PUT.

task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: If Replay builds thresholdsForMicroFeedback before primaryScore loads, thermal/amps/volts fallbacks may override correct TIG values.
task_scores.higher_leverage_alternative: WelderReport callout alone (4.3) delivers visible outcome in ~30min; could defer micro-feedback wiring until after first demo.
task_scores.reasoning: Report callout is high visibility; micro-feedback wiring depends on Step 2.3 full spec; reversible.

critical_issues: Step 1.2 migration: down_revision must match actual alembic head; if 003_add_score_total filename or revision string differs, upgrade fails with branch error.
Step 1.4 multi-worker: in-memory cache is process-local; Gunicorn with multiple workers will serve stale thresholds after admin PUT until restart — no shared invalidation.
minor_issues: Step 3.4 form code snippet uses placeholder '...inputs' for Thermal/Amps/Volts section — executor may miss fields.
Step 4.5 demo callout is hardcoded MIG spec; if demo later uses TIG session, callout will mismatch.
suggestions: Add explicit test_put_threshold_invalidates_cache to Phase 1 verification — already in 4.6 but critical path should assert cache before Phase 2.
Consider shipping Step 4.3 (WelderReport callout) before Step 4.1 (generateMicroFeedback params) — callout is visible within 48h with minimal dependency.
Document backfill_score_total.py compatibility in Phase 1 notes — plan does this; ensure executor sees it before running backfill.
dependency_order: Phase 1 (all steps) before Phase 2 — threshold_service and API must exist. Step 1.3 (process_type on Session) before Step 2.3 — get_session_score requires session_model.process_type. Phase 2 Step 2.3 before Phase 4 — active_threshold_spec must include thermal/amps/volts/heat_diss for micro-feedback. Phase 1 API before Phase 3 — admin fetches from GET /api/thresholds.
premortem_top_risk: Migration 004 fails because down_revision does not match the actual 003 revision in the alembic chain, blocking Phase 1 and all subsequent work.
goal_alignment_notes: The four phases together directly serve the stated goal: procurement teams see configurable thresholds and 'Evaluated against MIG spec' callout. All P0 acceptance criteria are addressed. Phase 2 and 3 deliver the core 'calibrate to your spec' demo within ~11h; Phase 4 adds visibility polish. Time window (16–24h) is respected with 22h total estimate.
